falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 rises by 5% or more in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the pattern's similarity to a historical bottom and invalidate the HOLD signal by indicating bullish momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 50%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical bottom pattern would undermine the basis for the current UNKNOWN verdict and signal a different market dynamic.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 70 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A surge in blowoff score would indicate a high-probability blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current HOLD and UNKNOWN verdicts.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
